metadata.name: Update League Standings in Real Time

description: As a game ends, an agent must immediately update the official league standings.

nodes.task_description: Receive the final score and official result of the completed game.

expected_outcome.value: Agent receives the final score from the official scorer.

nodes.task_description: Update the win/loss records for both teams involved.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully updates the records for the two teams.

nodes.task_description: Recalculate the league standings based on the new records.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully re-ranks all teams in the league.

nodes.task_description: Publish the updated standings to the league website and mobile app.

expected_outcome.value: Agent pushes the new standings to all public-facing platforms.
